metric_notes.gap_to_optimum_note: Exact optimum values are not available for all instances in this practical B&P pipeline. Gap is reported against best score found across repeated runs per instance.
metric_notes.success_rate_note: success_reference_hit is 1 when a run matches reference_best_score for that instance.
metric_notes.bp_note: This is a practical branch-and-price style pipeline: LP column generation at root with heuristic pricing, then integer master over generated columns.
